text: A Creation represent a collection of [sm.body, bodies] linked together by [sm.joint, joints].

params: The uuid of shape to build.

text: Exports creation to blueprint formatted json string.
params: Export the current world transform of bodies. Defaults to false.
Force export to dynamic bodies. Defaults to false.

text: Exports creation to blueprint lua table.
params: Export the current world transform of bodies. Defaults to false.
Force export to dynamic bodies. Defaults to false.

text: Returns a table with uuid's and quantity. A body can be sent in to remove from blueprint cost.
params: The file path for the blueprint.

text: Returns a table with uuid's and quantity. A body can be sent in to remove from blueprint cost.
params: The lua table for the blueprint.

text: Imports blueprint json file to world.
If the blueprint was not exported with transforms the importer will treat it as if importTransforms was disabled.
params: World position of import. If importTransforms is enabled position is applied to the imported transform. (Defaults to vec3.zero().)
World rotation of import. If importTransforms is enabled rotation is applied to the imported transform. (Defaults to quat.identity().)
Import world transforms from bodies. (Defaults to false.)
(DEPRECATED) Ignored, use setDestructable(false) on each body in creation. (Defaults to false)
return: The table {[Body], ...} of bodies created from the blueprint.

text: Imports blueprint json string to world.
If the blueprint was not exported with transforms the importer will treat it as if importTransforms was disabled.
params: World position of import. If importTransforms is enabled position is applied to the imported transform. (Defaults to vec3.zero().)
World rotation of import. If importTransforms is enabled rotation is applied to the imported transform. (Defaults to quat.identity().)
Import world transforms from bodies. (Defaults to false.)
Import interactables in an inactive state. (Defaults to false.)
return: The table {[Body], ...} of bodies created from the blueprint.
